description_long: This object is a colorful assortment of sushi pieces arranged closely together, featuring a variety of toppings and garnishes. The selection includes nigiri with different types of fish such as tuna, salmon, and shrimp, as well as gunkan-maki topped with orange fish roe. Some pieces are wrapped with nori seaweed, while others are adorned with a strip of green wasabi or a yellow mound of grated ginger. A decorative plastic grass divider is placed among the sushi, adding a touch of visual separation. The sushi pieces are presented on a flat, neutral surface with no visible tray or plate.
description: A vibrant assortment of sushi pieces with various fish, roe, and garnishes, arranged together with a plastic grass divider.
description_view_0: Front view showing a dense cluster of sushi pieces, with visible roe, wasabi, and plastic grass at the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the variety of fish toppings and the arrangement of sushi pieces, with roe and ginger visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the plastic grass divider and the backs of the sushi pieces, with more fish and nori visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the nori-wrapped pieces and the plastic grass divider in the foreground.
